info.title: OpenCode Gateway HTTP API
info.description:
Local JSON API served by the OpenCode Gateway daemon (default http://127.0.0.1:4097), consumed by the Gateway MCP server, CLI, dashboard, and channel adapters. Generated from the documented route table in docs/api/http-api.md.

Versioning intent: routes are currently served unprefixed and are treated as v1. A future `/v1` alias prefix (keeping the unprefixed routes as back-compat aliases) is a planned additive change in the daemon router; this contract documents the v1 surface today.

gatewayBearer.description: Gateway capability token. The x-required-capability operation field names the minimum runtime capability; admin satisfies every route, and operator/asset_write satisfy read.

whatsappSignature.name: X-Hub-Signature-256
whatsappSignature.description: Meta HMAC signature verified over the raw request body.

whatsappVerificationToken.name: hub.verify_token
whatsappVerificationToken.description: Meta webhook setup verification token. This query credential applies only to the GET challenge; POST delivery uses X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC verification.

discordSignature.name: X-Signature-Ed25519
discordSignature.description: Discord Ed25519 request signature; X-Signature-Timestamp is also required.

get.summary: Dashboard HTML.
Dashboard HTML.
Minimal live event HTML page.
Server-sent event stream.
Basic daemon health.

Component health report for daemon, leadership, dashboard, storage, scheduler, channel adapters, OpenCode connectivity, and config validity, including remediation hints. Preserves legacy queue counts; component counts are exposed as serviceCounts.
Redacted local writer lease status: this daemon identity, current leader fingerprint, lease age/expiry, writer/standby mode, and remediation.

post.summary: Re-check the local writer lease and recover leadership only when the stored leader lease is stale. Returns 409 while another daemon still owns a fresh lease.

get.summary: Diagnostic report.
Workspace health summary (alphaHealth): service health, scheduler recovery, channel delivery, open gates, eval scorecards, backup/restore, and blocker indicators.
Local operating readiness state, checks, and operating mode.
Redacted beta operator cockpit with scheduler safety, queue state, attention, channel scope, and deferred release gates.
Read-only live-state hygiene report for stale claim codes, expired gates, stale OpenCode session links, and stale parent receipts.

post.summary: Apply a supported operator action: status, hygiene, pause, resume, recover, or reset-stale.
Apply one lease-safe active-run control: cancel, stop, retry, or restart. Requires operator capability for exposed mode.

get.summary: Budget, quota, cost, token, and runtime governance state.

Read-only run-history analytics over a bounded, indexed started_at window. Default view=summary returns spend/usage grouped by by (profile, agent, or roadmap), outcome distribution, retry hotspots, and budget trend; view=scorecard returns the per-dimension completion + cost scorecard with derived underperformers.
Unified Needs Attention report for Gateway gates, tasks, stale runs, and OpenCode-native requests.
Read-only composite of the whole operator attention set (gates, questions, permissions, blocked tasks, stale runs, completion proposals) plus active alerts, in one payload. Backs gateway_triage.
Latest main-agent briefing with changed work, active runs, blockers, gates, OpenCode requests, completions, delegated work, alerts, supervisor receipts, and recommended next actions.
Read the durable active-alert snapshot plus read-only metrics without running alert evaluation or mutating state.

post.summary: Run alert evaluation and persist the resulting alert lifecycle updates. Requires operator capability and daemon writer leadership.
Acknowledge, resolve, or suppress an alert.

get.summary: Local metrics, active alerts, redacted trace correlation, and SLO snapshot.
Prometheus-format runtime, scheduler, auth, channel, and alert metrics for local scraping.
Generate a local incident report.
Generate a redacted local incident bundle with manifest, trace correlation, SLO state, alert summaries, and nested evidence export.
Recent daemon logs.
Open a redacted text view of a file artifact ref already attached to a known Gateway run.
Inspect a redacted bounded local run artifact manifest by run ID. Use taskId and limit to list recent manifests without raw local file paths.

Export a deterministic redacted operator evidence bundle for a task, run, session, roadmap, project, or recent Gateway evidence. redact=false or unredacted=true requires admin for non-local requests and localAdmin=true explicit intent.
Read redacted config. redact=false requires admin for non-local requests and is audited.

x-conditional-capabilities.description: Unredacted config is admin-only and audited.

parameters.name: redact
parameters.description: Defaults to true. Setting redact=false requires an admin bearer token and records an audit entry.

patch.summary: Patch config. Requires admin for non-local requests and a destructive human gate when approval gating is enabled; retry with approvedGateId after approval.

get.summary: List Gateway state backups.

post.summary: Create a timestamped backup. Refuses while runs or starting dispatches are active unless allowActiveRuns=true; requires admin for non-local requests.

get.summary: Redacted storage source inventory and consistency scanner for database integrity, schema drift, sidecar corruption, channel checkpoint/outbox mismatch, and backup coverage. Returns 503 only for critical storage failures.

post.summary: Verify backup metadata, checksums, and SQLite integrity. Requires admin for non-local requests.
Restore a backup into isolated state and write scheduler/storage/channel recovery evidence. Requires admin for non-local requests.

get.summary: Export durable Gateway state as JSON. Requires admin for non-local requests and localAdmin=true dual-intent (JOE-952; always unredacted; rate-limited).

parameters.name: localAdmin
parameters.description: JOE-952 dual-intent. Must be true to export unredacted durable state. MCP state_export supplies this automatically because tool invocation is the operator intent.

403.description: Forbidden — missing admin capability or localAdmin dual-intent

post.summary: Restore a verified backup; requires stopped daemon or maintenanceMode=true. Requires admin for non-local requests and a destructive human gate when approval gating is enabled; retry with approvedGateId after approval.
Request restart. Requires admin for non-local requests; the action is audited and no human approval gate applies. A service manager must be installed for the daemon to come back automatically.
Request shutdown. Requires admin for non-local requests; the action is audited and no human approval gate applies.

get.summary: List queue snapshot.

post.summary: Create task.
Accept a DelegationRequest v1 and create or replay durable Gateway work with a stable receipt.
Create tasks atomically.

get.summary: Get task.

post.summary: Pause, resume, cancel, retry, done, or block.
Archive task.

get.summary: Explain whether a task is runnable, blocked, waiting, scheduled, paused, running, or done.
List dependencies for a task.

post.summary: Add a dependency.

get.summary: List roadmaps.

post.summary: Create roadmap.
Create roadmap and tasks atomically.
Atomically create an Initiative, its Issues, their dependency edges, and an optional supervisor in one all-or-nothing call. Backs gateway_plan_initiative.

Run a scheduler cycle now, dispatching all ready work up to maxConcurrent; honors a paused scheduler (truthful no-op when paused, no durable config change). A taskId/roadmapId ensures that target is eligible and highlights whether it dispatched, and the report always lists the full dispatched set. Backs gateway_dispatch_now.

get.summary: Get roadmap.

post.summary: Archive roadmap.
Recompute roadmap status.

get.summary: Summarized roadmap memory: decisions, evidence, failures, and recent tasks.
List roadmap supervisors, optionally filtered by roadmap or status.

post.summary: Create a roadmap supervisor for a roadmap and OpenCode session.

get.summary: Get one roadmap supervisor.

patch.summary: Update supervisor session, profile, status, cadence, cursor, completion, notification, or note fields.

post.summary: Archive a supervisor.

get.summary: List roadmap completion proposals, optionally filtered by roadmap or status.

post.summary: Propose roadmap completion with evidence, residual risks, and recommendation.

get.summary: Get one roadmap completion proposal.

post.summary: Approve or reject a pending completion proposal.

get.summary: List project aliases and surface bindings, optionally filtered by roadmap, scope, alias, or provider/chat/thread.

post.summary: Create or rebind a project alias to a roadmap, OpenCode session, and optional Telegram/WhatsApp surface.

get.summary: Resolve project context by bound chat/thread, alias, roadmap ID, session ID, or single active supervisor.
Get one project binding.

patch.summary: Update alias, roadmap, session, scope, channel fields, title, or rebind behavior.

post.summary: Create a supervised project with a roadmap, default supervisor, project alias, and optional surface binding.

get.summary: Resolve current project context and return formatted project status.
Resolve current project context and return recent project events and decisions.

post.summary: Queue the resolved project's default supervisor for immediate review.
Approve or reject the resolved project's pending completion proposal.
Pause or resume the resolved project's default supervisor.

get.summary: List recent runs.
Get run by run ID or session ID.
List dispatch acquisition journal rows for recovery inspection.

post.summary: Admin force-settle a dispatch acquisition after operator cleanup verification.

get.summary: List redacted execution environment snapshots and cleanup state.
Inspect one execution environment by environment ID or run ID.

post.summary: Retain, release, abort, or cleanup an execution environment. abort also aborts the active OpenCode session when applicable.
Reconcile active, retained, and cleanup-failed environments by backend.

get.summary: List Gateway workflow events.

x-conditional-capabilities.description: Raw workflow event payloads are admin-only.
Unredacted workflow event payloads are admin-only.

get.summary: List Gateway-level human approval gates.

post.summary: Create a durable human gate.

get.summary: Read one human gate.

post.summary: Approve or reject a gate with once or always scope.

get.summary: Scheduler settings and queue counts.

post.summary: Pause, resume, run once, or update scheduler config.
Pause new scheduler dispatch without changing existing active runs.
Resume scheduler dispatch.
Run one scheduler cycle immediately and return counts, leases, active tasks, and recent runs.

get.summary: List profiles.
Get one profile with compact promotion projection.

post.summary: Upsert profile.

get.summary: Inspect effective profile access, grants, and least-privilege warnings.
List the Agent Factory profile, team, and persisted blueprint catalog with stable IDs, versions, capability summaries, promotion state, and source metadata.

post.summary: Assemble a bounded team from a named Agent Factory blueprint/team definition without dispatching sessions. Returns stable team/member IDs, selected profile versions, grants, budget/gate placeholders, rejection reasons, and a durable audit receipt.

get.summary: List durable team assignments. Supports receiptId, taskId, roadmapId, runId, sessionId, memberId, and limit filters.

post.summary: Create deterministic executable assignments for assembled team members. Fails closed unless team assembly, work links, budgets, scope, evidence requirements, and gate definitions are valid.

get.summary: Read one team assignment with gate, review, and completion receipt history.

post.summary: Record a durable gate_result, review_outcome, or completion receipt. Completion receipts require required gates and evidence to be satisfied.

get.summary: List profile/team scorecards.

post.summary: Create or update deterministic scorecard evidence.

get.summary: Read one scorecard.
Read promotion state, latest scorecard, and decision history.

post.summary: Open or apply a human-gated promote, deprecate, rollback, or block decision.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

get.summary: List normalized project/domain agent teams.

post.summary: Validate an agent-team proposal without mutating config. Optional taskId and stage validate dispatch resolution.
Validate a proposal and create a human gate for applying it.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

get.summary: Get one team and its roadmap/task references.

put.summary: Apply a team definition after an approved human gate. Without a gate, returns 202 and a pending gate.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

delete.summary: Delete an unreferenced team after an approved human gate.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

get.summary: Inspect effective team access across resolved profiles, requirements, grants, and least-privilege warnings.

post.summary: Same gated apply flow as PUT /agent-teams/:name.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

post.summary: Bind a team to exactly one roadmapId or taskId after an approved human gate.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

get.summary: List persisted blueprint files from the Agent Factory catalog. Invalid files are returned as blocked entries with validation errors.

post.summary: Validate one blueprint and return diff, validation, rollback, and apply-safety data without mutating config.
Apply a valid blueprint after an approved human gate. Without a gate, returns 202 and a pending blueprint apply gate.

202.description: Accepted for asynchronous or gated processing

get.summary: Pending OpenCode questions.

post.summary: Reply to a question.
Reject a question.

get.summary: Pending OpenCode permissions.

post.summary: Reply to a permission.
Reject a permission without granting the requested tool action.

get.summary: List Gateway-owned sessions by default. gatewayOnly=false broadens the result to all OpenCode sessions and requires admin; limit is bounded from 1 through 500.

x-conditional-capabilities.description: Listing all OpenCode sessions is admin-only.
Listing sessions not owned by Gateway is an admin-only expansion of the default read-scoped result.
Raw OpenCode session rows are admin-only.
Unredacted OpenCode session rows are admin-only.

parameters.name: gatewayOnly
parameters.description: Defaults to true. Setting gatewayOnly=false broadens the result to all OpenCode sessions and requires an admin bearer token.

get.summary: Get session and Web/TUI links plus Mission Control/session evidence fallback text. Missing/stale OpenCode sessions return structured 404 recovery JSON instead of a raw OpenCode NotFound error or dead Web deep link.

x-conditional-capabilities.description: Raw OpenCode session details are admin-only.
Unredacted OpenCode session details are admin-only.
Unredacted OpenCode session details are admin-only.

get.summary: Recent session messages. limit must be an integer from 1 through 200 and is passed to OpenCode upstream.
Child sessions.

post.summary: Abort session.
Capacity-gated OpenCode session admit with durable admission receipt. Not a free spawn surface. Returns 429 when capacity is full.

get.summary: List OpenCode agents (persona labels/modes).

post.summary: Create an OpenCode primary-mode persona agent (optional skill content).

get.summary: List durable AgentPresence records (always-on assistant sticky bindings; not channel typing presence).

post.summary: Create an AgentPresence (requires an existing OpenCode agent).

get.summary: Get one AgentPresence.

patch.summary: Update AgentPresence status, sticky session, or channel bind.

get.summary: List OpenCode assets.
List OpenCode assets.
List OpenCode assets.

x-conditional-capabilities.description: Raw OpenCode asset metadata is admin-only.
Unredacted OpenCode asset metadata is admin-only.
Unredacted OpenCode asset metadata is admin-only.

post.summary: Upsert OpenCode assets. Requires asset_write or admin for non-local requests.

delete.summary: Delete OpenCode assets. Requires asset_write or admin for non-local requests.

get.summary: Return the channel capability matrix for active adapters and planned surfaces plus the canonical channel action parity matrix (actionParity), native control coverage, and operator journeys used by typed commands, native slash commands, command menus, and Mission Control.
Return provider-neutral connector setup status, lifecycle state, missing prerequisites, redacted evidence refs, webhook readiness, and safe repair actions. Optional provider returns one connector.

post.summary: Generate a short-lived provider-scoped trusted-target claim code for Mission Control or CLI setup flows. Request provider and optional ttlSeconds; response includes the one-time code, expiry, and redacted claim metadata.

get.summary: List bindings.

post.summary: Upsert binding.
Send to a channel.
Send to task-bound channels.
Send to roadmap-bound channels.

get.summary: WhatsApp verification challenge using the hub.mode, hub.verify_token, and hub.challenge query parameters; this setup request does not use POST body HMAC.

parameters.name: hub.mode
parameters.description: Meta verification mode; must be subscribe.

parameters.name: hub.verify_token
parameters.description: Verification token compared in constant time with the configured WhatsApp verify token.

parameters.name: hub.challenge
parameters.description: Opaque challenge echoed as the successful text response.

post.summary: WhatsApp inbound webhook authenticated with X-Hub-Signature-256 HMAC over the raw request body.
Discord signed interaction webhook.

get.summary: Recent Gateway OpenCode session sidecar state.
